entities.name: SORGHUM
entities.description: A mandate crop of ICRISAT used in germplasm exchange and research.

entities.name: THAILAND
entities.description: Country from which sorghum germplasm showing resistance to sugarcane aphid was sourced.

entities.name: RESISTANCE
entities.description: The ability of sorghum germplasm to withstand attack by sugarcane aphid.

entities.name: SUGARCANE APHID
entities.description: Melanaphis sacchari Zehntner, a pest that affects sorghum.

entities.name: ICRISAT
entities.description: International Crops Research Institute for the Semi Arid Tropics, an organization managing sorghum germplasm.

entities.name: AP
entities.description: Andhra Pradesh, the state where Patancheru is located.

entities.name: INDIA
entities.description: Country where ICRISAT and NBPGR are located.

entities.name: AFRICA
entities.description: Continent involved in sorghum germplasm exchange.

entities.name: AMERICA
entities.description: Continent involved in sorghum germplasm exchange.

entities.name: ASIA
entities.description: Continent involved in sorghum germplasm exchange.

entities.name: EUROPE
entities.description: Continent involved in sorghum germplasm exchange.

entities.name: NBPGR
entities.description: National Bureau of Plant Genetic Resources, involved in importing sorghum germplasm.

entities.name: QUARANTINE PROCESSING
entities.description: The process of ensuring imported germplasm is free from pests and diseases.

entities.name: PEQIA
entities.description: Post-entry quarantine isolation area used to ensure germplasm is insect and disease free.

entities.name: INSECT AND DISEASE FREE
entities.description: The required state of germplasm before entering the ICRISAT gene bank.
